codeActions.title: Sort properties alphabetically
codeActions.description: Reorders all CSS property declarations within a rule block in alphabetical order for consistency and readability.

codeActions.title: Remove duplicate properties
codeActions.description: Detects and removes duplicate CSS property declarations within the same rule block, keeping the last occurrence.

codeActions.title: Convert px to rem
codeActions.description: Converts pixel values to rem units using a base font size of 16px (e.g., 16px → 1rem, 24px → 1.5rem).

codeActions.title: Convert rem to px
codeActions.description: Converts rem values to pixel units using a base font size of 16px (e.g., 1rem → 16px, 0.75rem → 12px).

codeActions.title: Add vendor prefixes
codeActions.description: Adds -webkit-, -moz-, -ms-, -o- prefixed versions for properties that require vendor prefixes for broader browser support (e.g., transform, appearance, backdrop-filter).

codeActions.title: Convert hex to rgb()
codeActions.description: Converts hexadecimal color values to rgb() functional notation (e.g., #ff0000 → rgb(255, 0, 0)).

codeActions.title: Convert hex to hsl()
codeActions.description: Converts hexadecimal color values to hsl() functional notation (e.g., #ff0000 → hsl(0, 100%, 50%)).

codeActions.title: Convert rgb() to hex
codeActions.description: Converts rgb() or rgba() functional notation to hexadecimal color values (e.g., rgb(255, 0, 0) → #ff0000).

codeActions.title: Extract CSS custom property
codeActions.description: Extracts a repeated value into a CSS custom property (variable) defined on :root and replaces all occurrences with var(--name).

codeActions.title: Add missing semicolons
codeActions.description: Inserts missing semicolons at the end of CSS property declarations within rule blocks.

codeActions.title: Expand shorthand property
codeActions.description: Expands a shorthand property (margin, padding, border, background, font, animation, transition) into its individual longhand properties.

codeActions.title: Collapse to shorthand property
codeActions.description: Combines individual longhand properties (e.g., margin-top, margin-right, margin-bottom, margin-left) into their shorthand equivalent.

codeActions.title: Convert named color to hex
codeActions.description: Converts a CSS named color (e.g., red, blue, rebeccapurple) to its hexadecimal equivalent.

codeActions.title: Add fallback for CSS custom property
codeActions.description: Adds a fallback value to var() expressions that are missing one: var(--name) → var(--name, fallback).

codeActions.title: Convert to logical properties
codeActions.description: Converts physical properties (margin-left, padding-right, border-top, width, height) to their logical property equivalents (margin-inline-start, padding-inline-end, border-block-start, inline-size, block-size) for better internationalization support.
